4. **Podcast Interview**: Lukaku discusses his experiences and clarifies that he has never been contacted by the Democratic Republic of the Congo regarding national team matters. [Listen to the podcast](https://x.com/lnstantFoot/status/2061512525997302178) (Source: x.com).

5. **Film Review**: A YouTube video discusses a film titled "Suamiku Lukaku," which has gained attention recently. [Watch the review](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZFpszoUcIz4) (Source: youtube.com).
